result.stdout:
1.0.8

Usage: appconfig [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information
  --help        Show help information
  -v|--verbose  Verbose
  -q|--quiet    Quiet

Commands:
  cleanup       Clean Up App Settings from Azure App Configuration
  export        Export App Settings from Azure App Configuration to JSON
  import        Import App Settings from JSON to Azure App Configuration
  secret        Manage Azure KeyVault secrets
  validate      Validate an App Settings JSON file

Run 'appconfig [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
1.0.8

Usage: appconfig [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information
  --help        Show help information
  -v|--verbose  Verbose
  -q|--quiet    Quiet

Commands:
  cleanup       Clean Up App Settings from Azure App Configuration
  export        Export App Settings from Azure App Configuration to JSON
  import        Import App Settings from JSON to Azure App Configuration
  secret        Manage Azure KeyVault secrets
  validate      Validate an App Settings JSON file

Run 'appconfig [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Clean Up App Settings from Azure App Configuration

Usage: appconfig cleanup [options]

Options:
  --help                                      Show help information
  -c|--connection-string <connection_string>  Azure App Configuration connection
                                              string
  --keyvault-name <name>                      Azure KeyVault Name, excluding the
                                              https:// prefix and
                                              .vault.azure.net
  --dry-run                                   DryRun
  -v|--verbose                                Verbose
  -q|--quiet                                  Quiet

result.stdout:
Export App Settings from Azure App Configuration to JSON

Usage: appconfig export [options]

Options:
  --help                                      Show help information
  --export-file <path>                        Path to export file in JSON format
  --force                                     Overwrite existing files
  -c|--connection-string <connection_string>  Azure App Configuration connection
                                              string
  --keyvault-name <name>                      Azure KeyVault Name, excluding the
                                              https:// prefix and
                                              .vault.azure.net
  --dry-run                                   DryRun
  -v|--verbose                                Verbose
  -q|--quiet                                  Quiet

result.stdout:
Import App Settings from JSON to Azure App Configuration

Usage: appconfig import [options]

Options:
  --help                                      Show help information
  --import-file <path>                        ImportFile
  --strict                                    Ensure that KeyVault values exist
                                              for App Configuration references
  --separator                                 Override the default separator
                                              character
  -c|--connection-string <connection_string>  Azure App Configuration connection
                                              string
  --keyvault-name <name>                      Azure KeyVault Name, excluding the
                                              https:// prefix and
                                              .vault.azure.net
  --dry-run                                   DryRun
  -v|--verbose                                Verbose
  -q|--quiet                                  Quiet
